commit.subject: LU-19819: utils: enhance 'lctl changelog register/deregister' usage message
commit.message:
LU-19819: utils: enhance 'lctl changelog register/deregister' usage message

This commit update help messages to ensure a clean output.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Aurélien Cedeyn <acedeyn@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I8bd3f1158c190d8b28ee8a0d4f96e4a68347c83f
